texto: Two demons: one who insists that what is to be inferred by verbal processes must correspond to experience
autor: and one who 'insists that what cannot be arrived at by verbal processes cannot correspond to experience.
explicacao: Orientação direta de and one who 'insists that what cannot be arrived at by verbal processes cannot correspond to experience. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Two demons: one who insists that what is to be inferred by verbal processes must correspond to ex…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, nanamoli-thera, demons, útil em momentos de reflexao.
